title: MCP Servers
description: The <0>Model Context Protocol</0> enables communication with locally running MCP servers that provide additional tools and resources to extend C's capabilities. You can use <1>community-made servers</1> or ask C to create new tools specific to your workflow (e.g., "add a tool that gets the latest npm docs").

enableToggle.title: Enable MCP Servers
enableToggle.description: Turn this ON to let C use tools from connected MCP servers. This gives C more capabilities. If you don't plan to use these extra tools, turn it OFF to help reduce API token costs.

enableServerCreation.title: Enable MCP Server Creation
enableServerCreation.description: Enable this to have C help you build <1>new</1> custom MCP servers. <0>Learn about server creation</0>
enableServerCreation.hint: Hint: To reduce API token costs, disable this setting when you are not actively asking C to create a new MCP server.

learnMoreEditingSettings: Learn more about editing MCP settings files

networkTimeout.label: Network Timeout
networkTimeout.description: Maximum time to wait for server responses

deleteDialog.title: Delete MCP Server
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete the MCP server "{{serverName}}"? This action cannot be undone.

marketplace.title: MCP Marketplace
marketplace.description: Discover trusted MCP servers for search, coding, docs, databases, files, and team workflows. Choose one and C will set it up in a guided task.

search.label: Search marketplace
search.placeholder: Search by name, category, package, or secret...

customDiscovery.title: Can't find the MCP server?
customDiscovery.description: Enter the MCP server you want and C will open an MCP Setup task to discover official docs, propose safe config, and verify it with your installed research tools.

validation.empty: Enter an MCP server name or description before starting discovery.

create.description: Describe the MCP server or tooling you want and C will open an MCP Setup task to design, implement, configure, and verify a custom local server.
create.inputLabel: What should the new MCP server do?
create.placeholder: Example: Add a tool that looks up internal package docs from this workspace
create.recommendation: Context7 and web search can help with docs, but creation is not blocked if they are not installed.

validation.empty: Enter what you want the MCP server to do before starting custom MCP server creation.

requirements.missingBoth: Install Context7 and at least one web search MCP server before starting custom MCP discovery.
requirements.missingContext7: Install Context7 before starting custom MCP discovery.
requirements.missingWebSearch: Install at least one web search MCP server, such as Exa Web Search, Brave Search, Tavily Search, or Firecrawl, before starting custom MCP discovery.

empty.title: No MCP servers found
empty.description: Try a different search term or clear the selected category filter.
